query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM campaignContacts;
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN email IS NULL THEN 'no_email'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@gmail.%' OR email LIKE '%@hotmail.%' OR email LIKE '%@yahoo.%' OR email LIKE '%@outlook.%' OR email LIKE '%@live.%' OR email LIKE '%@bigpond.%' OR email LIKE '%@icloud.%' THEN 'personal'
    ELSE 'corporate'
  END as email_type,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM campaignContacts
GROUP BY email_type
ORDER BY cnt DESC;

    WHEN email LIKE '%@gmail.%' OR email LIKE '%@hotmail.%' OR email LIKE '%@yahoo.%' OR email LIKE '%@outlook.%' OR email LIKE '%@live.%' OR email LIKE '%@bigpond.%' OR email LIKE '%@icloud.%' THEN 'personal'
    ELSE 'corporate'
  END as email_type,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM campaignContacts
GROUP BY email_type
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
